keyFeatures.en: Combine multiple PDF files into one
keyFeatures.zh: 将多个PDF文件合并为一个

keyFeatures.en: Split a PDF file into multiple pages
Convert PDF to other file formats
keyFeatures.zh: 将PDF转换为其他文件格式

description.en: No restrictions on file size or number of files. Limited to 50 monthly credits.
description.zh: 无文件大小或数量限制。每月限制50积分。

weaknesses.en: Limited to 50 monthly credits, which may be insufficient for heavy users.
weaknesses.zh: 每月限制50积分，对于重度用户可能不够用。

weaknesses.en: No commercial use allowed, which may limit its use in business scenarios.
weaknesses.zh: 不允许商业使用，可能限制其在商业场景中的应用。

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small businesses who need basic PDF file management tools.
targetAudience.zh: 需要基本PDF文件管理工具的个人和小型企业。

positioning.en: A simple and free tool for basic PDF file management.
positioning.zh: 一个简单且免费的基本PDF文件管理工具。
